seoTitle: Forest Lodge vs Forestville — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Forest Lodge and Forestville. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Forest Lodge vs Forestville: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Forest Lodge and Forestville.
heading: Forest Lodge vs Forestville — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Forest Lodge, New South Wales and Forestville, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Forestville has a lower overall climate risk score (45/100) compared to Forest Lodge (46/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Forest Lodge or Forestville safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Forest Lodge has a flood risk score of 49/100, while Forestville scores 54/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Forest Lodge scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. Forestville scores 44/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Forest Lodge or Forestville?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Forestville has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.4% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
